span_mappings.nl_span: The length of the concatenation of two lists equals the sum of their lengths

formal_statement: theorem qa_mathlib21_list_length_append {α : Type u} (l₁ l₂ : List α) : (l₁ ++ l₂).length = l₁.length + l₂.length
natural_language_claim: The length of the concatenation of two lists equals the sum of their lengths.
